steps.title: Spot the spatial and conceptual shift
steps.content: The passage moves from Elara with a prograde orbit to Harpalyke with a retrograde orbit — a spatial shift to a different moon with contrasting orbital characteristics.

steps.title: Apply the transition
steps.content: ”Elsewhere” marks the shift to a different location (Harpalyke) while preparing for the contrasting orbital direction. The other three choices either elaborate on the same concept, restate information, or present additional examples of the same type — none fit introducing a different moon with opposite orbital behavior. This matches choice D — D is correct.
